summary: Matched and linked src/melee/vi/vi1101.c by implementing un_8031F714_OnEnter, refining un_8031F294 player/setup code, correcting vi1101 data/symbol layout, and marking vi1101.c Matching in configure.py. Ancillary changes adjusted math_ppc/sqrtf include placement and moved HSD_MtxColMagFloat inline definitions into the C files that need them; ifmagnify/mndatadel/mninfo changes are mostly formatting. decomp-dev bot reported +588 matched code bytes, +1772 linked code bytes, and vi1101 OnEnter/data/sdata/sdata2/sbss reaching 100%.
key_files: src/melee/vi/vi1101.c - implemented un_8031F714_OnEnter, refined un_8031F294, added Vi1101Data/static constants/data definitions
configure.py - changed melee/vi/vi1101.c from NonMatching to Matching
config/GALE01/symbols.txt - adjusted vi1101 data/sdata/sdata2 symbol sizes, scopes, and local labels
src/sysdolphin/baselib/mtx.h - removed math_ppc include and HSD_MtxColMagFloat inline
src/sysdolphin/baselib/displayfunc.c - added local HSD_MtxColMagFloat inline and math_ppc include
src/sysdolphin/baselib/robj.c - added local HSD_MtxColMagFloat inline and math_ppc include
src/melee/if/ifmagnify.c, src/melee/mn/mndatadel.c, src/melee/mn/mninfo.c - mostly ninja/style reflow
src/melee/gr/grmutecity.c, src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c, src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c, src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c, jobj.c, mtx.c, particle.c - added MSL/math_ppc.h includes
what_changed: Replaced the placeholder for un_8031F714_OnEnter with a C implementation that initializes audio/effects, loads vi1101 archives/symbols, builds light/camera/model GObjs, animates scene JObjs/CObjs, calls un_8031F294(input[0], input[1]), and restores audio state.

Reworked un_8031F294 signatures and internals from int char_index/costume_index to s32 arg0/arg1, used VecMtxPtr for grLib_801C9A10, GET_JOBJ for player entities, named static float constants for 1.0f/0.0f/432.0f, and used un_80400200.spawns for player spawn positions.

Introduced Vi1101Data combining three Vec3 spawn positions plus the resource strings Vi1101.dat, visual1101Scene, and visual1101Cam2Scene, replacing the previous standalone Vec3 array and aligning the .data object layout.

Defined vi1101 data in C, including u8 un_804D6FD8[8], GXColor un_804D5B08 = {0, 0, 0, 0xff}, static SceneDesc/archive pointers, and static f32 constants; config/GALE01/symbols.txt was updated for object sizes and local/global symbol scope.
Marked Object(Matching, "melee/vi/vi1101.c") in configure.py, moving vi1101 from NonMatching to Matching.
Updated vi1101.h by removing placeholder.h and the extern for un_804D5B08, changing un_8031F294 to s32 parameters and un_8031F714_OnEnter to void*, and keeping un_804D6FD8 extern.
Moved HSD_MtxColMagFloat out of baselib/mtx.h and into displayfunc.c and robj.c, while adding explicit <MSL/math_ppc.h> includes to several files that need math_ppc/sqrtf behavior.
Applied mostly non-semantic formatting/reflow in ifmagnify.c/.h, mndatadel.c, and mninfo.c; the diff does not show behavioral changes there beyond formatting/include order.
smart_moves: Bundling spawn vectors and archive symbol names into Vi1101Data made the .data boundary explicit and matched the symbol-size correction from 0x58 to 0x54 with a local ...data.0 label.

The OnEnter implementation follows scene-setup structure already visible in engine APIs: load symbols by resource names, create LObj/CObj/JObj GObjs, attach GX links/procs, animate at 0.0f, then delegate character-specific setup to un_8031F294.
Keeping uncertain entity fields as unk0/unk4 instead of p1/p2 avoided overclaiming semantics while still improving the struct over raw globals.
Using static float constants for repeated animation/facing values gave the compiler concrete local sdata2 constants instead of relying on raw literals throughout the function.
Changing the audio bit mask to ((u64) 0x20 << 48) | lbAudioAx_80026E84(arg0) is a codegen-aware way to express the same high-bit constant while fitting the matched function.
Localizing HSD_MtxColMagFloat to displayfunc.c and robj.c, and adding math_ppc includes only where needed, reduced broad header side effects from baselib/mtx.h.
decomp_lessons: For VI scene files, matching often depends on data layout as much as code: packed spawn vectors plus resource strings can need a dedicated struct to reproduce .data exactly.
When a symbol becomes file-local or compiler-local, update symbols.txt scopes and names accordingly; this PR converted several sdata2 globals at 0x804DE0D8-0x804DE0F0 into local @ constants.
Header cleanup should follow ownership: remove externs for data now defined/private in the C file, and replace placeholder/UNK_T with concrete types only when the diff supports them.
Callback signatures may need unused parameters to match engine call conventions; fn_8031F56C changed from one parameter to (HSD_GObj*, int unused) for GXLink use.

Inline helpers in shared headers can disturb codegen or dependencies across many translation units; moving a sqrtf-based helper to exact users and making <MSL/math_ppc.h> includes explicit is reusable for baselib matching work.
Formatting churn from ninja apply can obscure the semantic core; future reviewers/searches should separate vi1101 matching changes from ifmagnify/mndatadel/mninfo line wrapping.
naming_conventions: Unresolved game functions retained address-based names such as un_8031F294 and un_8031F714_OnEnter.
Scene lifecycle functions use suffixes like _OnEnter and _OnFrame, as seen with un_8031F714_OnEnter and un_8031F960_OnFrame.
Local callbacks continue to use fn_ address names, including fn_8031F548, fn_8031F56C, and fn_8031F600.
Unknown struct fields were named unk0 and unk4 rather than speculative semantic names.
The new resource/data wrapper uses a descriptive local type Vi1101Data with fields spawns, vi1101_dat, visual1101_scene, and visual1101_cam2_scene.
symbols.txt distinguishes global unknown data names like un_80400200/un_804D5B08 from local compiler labels like @166 and ...data.0.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Flipped configure.py from NonMatching to Matching for melee/vi/vi1101.c only after the file linked and the bot reported 100% for the vi1101 OnEnter/data-related units.
Used a single Vi1101Data object to control exact .data layout, string offsets, and spawn-table addressing; OnEnter accesses it as a char* for lbArchive_LoadSymbols offsets 0x24, 0x30, and 0x40.
Replaced raw floating literals in player setup and animation requests with static f32 const values un_804DE0D8, un_804DE0DC, and un_804DE0E0 to align sdata2 usage.

Used temporaries and assignment-in-call patterns in OnEnter, such as new_var2 = un_804D6FC0->models[var_r31]->joint and new_var3 = HSD_GObj_804D7849, which are typical register/codegen nudges in matching code.
Changed the camera callback signature to include an unused int parameter for the GObj GX callback path.
Moved HSD_MtxColMagFloat inline definitions from mtx.h to the two C files where its generated code was needed, while adding <MSL/math_ppc.h> includes across math users.
review_feedback: No human review comments or PR body were present in the slice, so there is no direct reviewer rationale to extract.

decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 improvements: matched code 66.44% (+588 bytes), linked code 38.38% (+1772 bytes), matched data 38.77% (+472 bytes), linked data 33.03% (+160 bytes), with 12 new matches including main/melee/vi/vi1101 un_8031F714_OnEnter and vi1101 .data/.sdata/.sdata2/.sbss.
follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for renames or documentation of un_8031F294 and un_8031F714_OnEnter.
Compare other melee/vi OnEnter implementations that load SceneDesc data through lbArchive_LoadSymbols.
Audit whether unk0/unk4 in the vi1101 local struct later receive semantic names.
Look for later cleanup around HSD_MtxColMagFloat after its removal from baselib/mtx.h.
Check whether the broad MSL/math_ppc.h include additions affected other matching units or were later narrowed.
